meta.homeDescription: Turn a public Bluesky profile into a collectible social stats card.
meta.cardDescription: {name} scored {ovr} OVR as {archetype}. Create yours with public Bluesky data.
meta.genericDescription: Create a collectible card from public Bluesky activity.

landing.headline: Turn your Bluesky profile into a collectible card.
landing.subheadline: Enter a handle and discover your activity, impact and conversation style.
landing.label: Enter a Bluesky handle
landing.disclaimer: Uses public data only. Scores are generated for entertainment. Not affiliated with Bluesky.
landing.howIntro: A lightweight flow reads public Bluesky activity and turns it into a shareable card.
landing.step1Text: Use a handle, a Bluesky profile URL, or a DID.
landing.step2Text: SkyCards reads up to 300 public feed items from the last year.
landing.step3Text: Scores, tier, border, archetype and badges are generated deterministically.
landing.examplesIntro: Demo cards show the visual system only. Real cards never mix in sample data.
landing.shareText: Download a card PNG, export a social version, use native sharing when available, or copy the link.
landing.faqLoginQ: Do I need to log in?
landing.faqLoginA: No. The first version only uses public Bluesky endpoints.
landing.faqStoreA: No database is used. Public API responses may be cached technically for up to one hour.
landing.faqOfficialA: No. SkyCards is an independent entertainment project.
landing.faqScoresA: No. They summarize public activity for fun and are not a personal evaluation.

form.invalid: Enter a valid Bluesky handle, profile URL, or DID.
form.empty: Enter a handle to generate a card.
form.otherDomain: Only bsky.app profile URLs are supported.

result.sampleNoticeText: This card uses limited public activity, so behavioral scores are pulled closer to 50.
result.entertainment: Scores are generated for entertainment from public activity.

card.accessibleLabel: {name}'s card, @{handle}. Current side: {side}. {ovr} OVR, {tier} tier, {border} border, {archetype} archetype, {followers} followers and {following} following.

activity.name: Activity
activity.detail: Activity measures authored posts, replies and reposts with different weights.
activity.calculation: Weighted activity per week is scaled logarithmically.

consistency.name: Consistency
consistency.detail: Consistency rewards active weeks and steadier weekly behavior, not just volume.

engagement.name: Engagement
engagement.detail: Engagement uses received likes, reposts, replies, quotes and bookmarks on posts and replies.
engagement.calculation: Weighted received interactions are compared with authored activity and follower count.

impact.name: Impact
impact.short: How often original posts stand out.
impact.detail: Impact compares original posts against the account's own median interaction pattern.
impact.calculation: Hit posts and the strongest post determine the score.

replies.name: Replies
replies.detail: Replies only count external conversations. Replies to your own account are tracked separately.
replies.calculation: Reply share, unique accounts replied and reply frequency are combined.

network.name: Network
network.detail: Network combines follower count, follower/following balance and conversation connections.
network.calculation: This does not claim real reach; it summarizes public profile and conversation signals.

the-playmaker.name: The Playmaker
the-playmaker.description: A connector with strong replies and a visible public network.

the-viral-spark.name: The Viral Spark
the-viral-spark.description: Original posts often punch above the account's baseline.

the-headliner.name: The Headliner
the-headliner.description: A high-engagement profile whose strongest posts stand out.

the-broadcaster.name: The Broadcaster
the-broadcaster.description: A steady, active voice with a reliable publishing rhythm.

the-community-builder.name: The Community Builder
the-community-builder.description: A profile with healthy network signals and recurring conversations.

the-consistent-voice.name: The Consistent Voice
the-consistent-voice.description: A regular presence whose public activity shows a dependable cadence.

the-conversationalist.name: The Conversationalist
the-conversationalist.description: A reply-forward profile that spends real time in public discussions.

the-newcomer.name: The Newcomer
the-newcomer.description: A newer or quieter public profile with enough activity for a rookie card.

the-all-rounder.name: The All-Rounder
the-all-rounder.description: A balanced public profile without one dominant signal.

legacy-member.name: Legacy Member
legacy-member.description: The account age earns a Legacy Gold border.

viral-spark.name: Viral Spark
viral-spark.description: Impact is high or several posts beat the account baseline.

conversation-starter.name: Conversation Starter
conversation-starter.description: External conversation participation is especially strong.

community-builder.name: Community Builder
community-builder.description: Network score and conversation breadth are both strong.

rookie.name: Rookie
rookie.description: The card is based on a small public activity sample.

states.notFoundTitle: We could not find this profile
states.notFoundText: Check the handle and try again, or generate the example card.
states.thinTitle: This profile is still building its history
states.thinText: No public activities were found in the analysis window, so SkyCards will not invent stats.
states.unavailableText: The public API did not respond correctly. Try again in a moment.
states.rateLimitedTitle: Bluesky is asking us to slow down
states.rateLimitedText: Too many public API requests were made recently. Please try again later.
states.optOutTitle: This profile is not available for public analysis
states.optOutText: The profile has a public label that prevents unauthenticated display.
states.invalidTitle: This handle could not be analyzed
states.invalidText: Use a Bluesky handle, a bsky.app profile URL, or a DID.

download.title: Download your SkyCard
download.description: Choose the collectible card or a social image with background and caption.
download.themeHelp: The selected color appears in the downloaded PNG background.
download.failed: Could not export the image. Try again.

share.title: Share your SkyCard
share.description: Use native sharing when supported, copy the link, or download the image.
share.message: I just got an {ovr} OVR SkyCard. Create yours and compare your stats.
share.unsupported: Native file sharing is not available here, but you can copy the link or download the PNG.

methodology.title: How scores work
methodology.intro: SkyCards summarizes public activity into six attributes. The result is entertainment, not a personal or professional evaluation.
methodology.activity: ACT measures recent volume of posts, replies and reposts.
methodology.consistency: CON measures active weeks and steadiness.
methodology.engagement: ENG measures received interactions on authored activity.
methodology.impact: IMP measures posts that stand out against the profile's own baseline.
methodology.network: NET measures public network presence without claiming real reach.
methodology.overall: OVR blends the six scores and maps them to 60–99.
methodology.tierBorder: Tier is based on OVR. Border is based on account age. They are independent.

footer.disclaimer: Uses public Bluesky data. Scores are generated for entertainment. Not affiliated with Bluesky.
